reviews.comment:
El 01 de noviembre de 2021 me olvidé la cartera en el mini de esta YPF, a la hora y media, cuando me di cuenta, llame por teléfono y me dijeron que la cartera está allí, que la pase a buscar cuando quiera. Cuando fui a buscarla estaba todo intacto, todo tal cual lo deje. Quiero darles las Gracias a las personas que trabajan allí por la amabilidad y honestidad!!! Gracias gracias gracias

(Translated by Google)
On November 1, 2021, I forgot my wallet in the minibus at this YPF location. An hour and a half later, when I realized it, I called and they told me the wallet was there, and that I could pick it up whenever I wanted. When I went to pick it up, everything was intact, just as I had left it. I want to thank the people who work there for their kindness and honesty! Thank you, thank you, thank you.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHaGFlM01BEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy amables lis operarios y la cafetería excelente!!! Muchas veces vamos a desayunar allí.  Sus medialunas son exquisitas y los tostados, los mejores!!

(Translated by Google)
The staff are very friendly and the café is excellent! We often go there for breakfast. Their croissants are delicious and their toast is the best!

reviews.comment:
Pasé el domingo a la noche y el área de comida estaba cerrada, sólo el baño de discapacitados estaba abierto, el resto de servicios no opera, salvo el despacho de combustible y no aceptan pago electrónico o tarjetas, algo raro, porque es más seguro para el empleado no manejar dinero en efectivo.

(Translated by Google)
I went by on Sunday night and the food area was closed, only the disabled restroom was open, the rest of the services are not operating, except for the fuel station and they do not accept electronic payment or cards, which is strange, because it is safer for the employee not to handle cash.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHdnFTVURREAE
